candidate_summary: Dual-channel attacker (grapple semantic + frappe lexical) with EMA per-mode failure mixing; marabout K=8 pre-batch self-attack rejection warmup; opponent-specific identity-hash(checkpoint, batch_id) conditioning for both attacker persona and defender style.
content_words: marabout pre-fight self-warmup adversarial ritual defense
opponent-specific identity conditioning hash checkpoint prep
per-mode weakness signal attacker mode-switching policy

results.name: ACE-Safety Co-Evolution Tree-Group Dual-Aware
results.rationale: ACE-Safety co-evolves attacker-defender with dual-aware tree-group structure; strong functional overlap with dual-channel coevolution though lacks explicit grapple/frappe split.

results.name: AdvERSEM Semantic Structure
results.rationale: Targets semantic-structure robustness; partial overlap with grapple-channel but no dual-channel attack + no coevolution + no per-mode mixing.

results.name: Attack-as-Defense VLM Cross-Modal
results.rationale: Cross-modal attack-as-defense partially mirrors marabout self-attack warmup but is VLM-specific single-channel, no EMA mixing.

results.name: Proactive Defense Strategies Survey
results.rationale: Survey contextualizes pre-emptive warmup ideas; no specific dual-channel attacker + no identity-hash conditioning.

results.name: Adversarial Preference Learning Robust Alignment
results.rationale: Coevolutionary alignment flavor; lacks per-mode failure EMA, dual-channel split, opponent-hash conditioning.

results.name: Bullying Machine Personas Vulnerability
results.rationale: Persona-based vulnerability probing aligns with identity-hash idea but unilateral, no defender coevolution, no fast/slow channel mixing.

results.name: Multi-Turn Persona RL
results.rationale: Relevant to opponent-specific persona conditioning; missing dual-channel grapple/frappe + marabout pre-batch warmup.

results.name: LLM Self-Defense Self-Examination
results.rationale: Self-examination defense matches marabout pre-fight self-attack rejection warmup conceptually.

decision_rationale: 2/8 prior-art hits (ACE-Safety co-evolution + LLM Self-Defense self-warmup) at functional >=0.7; combined coverage on coevolution + self-warmup is sufficient to fail novelty per total_hits >= 1 rule. Primary at sem 0.78-0.92 / func 0.80-0.92 scored 8 hits; verifier judges 2; agree on FAIL verdict though hit-count diverges.
